name: Docs page renders documentation hub with section cards and article navigation
description: The docs page at /docs displays a documentation hub with a search input, categorized section cards that list clickable article links inside them, and a sidebar navigation.

planSteps.description: Verify the documentation hub page loads with a heading containing 'Documentation' or 'Docs', a search input field, and multiple category section cards displayed in a grid layout
Inside the 'Getting Started' section card, click on the first article link (e.g. 'Your First Open Source Contribution')
Verify the page navigates to the specific article page and displays the article content with a main heading matching the article title
